raw_consumer_statement:
The company said that the merchant declined a credit, so I cant get a refund/chargeback. 

However : 1 ) when speaking the to merchant after the fact, they said multiple times they do not have any record of Citi requesting a credit 2 ) I opened the dispute because the merchant wouldnt give me a credit, obviously they wouldnt give it back to Citi either 3 ) this isnt a please give me situation, this is a fraudulent transaction and Citi needs to chargeback the transaction rather than politely requesting a credit 4 ) Citi claims that the merchant claims delivery, however Ive provided countless proof to Citi that the delivery tracker is a scam, including multiple online links to websites and forums describing the exam scam I fell for
